[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 1101010010 5
3 1100001101 5
4 1100101100 5
5 0011011100 5
6 0000100100 2
7 0000000110 2
